IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (11763983.pdf)
SUMMARY: A people-oriented, results-driven professional with outstanding communication skills. Extensive experience delivering top-quality solutions for high-profile clients.
SKILLS: ACA, ADP Payroll, AS400, benefits administration, consultation, ERP, hiring, HRIS, Internet Explorer, Kronos, labor relations, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint, Word, organization development, payroll, PeopleSoft, personnel policies, recruitment, SOX, employee handbook

SOURCE: 11763983.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name - City , State
DATES: Sep 2014 - Current
DESCRIPTION: Built the department from the ground up as the first HR person. Put policies and procedures in place to ensure compliance with State and Federal law. Built relationships with Management and employees. Provided advice and consultation for employment matters. Administered employee benefits, payroll, workers compensation, FMLA, personal leave, unemployment, training, and conducted workplace investigations.

SOURCE: 11763983.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Representative
COMPANY: Company Name - City , State
DATES: Jul 2014 - Aug 2014
DESCRIPTION: Administered employee benefits, unemployment, FMLA, short term disability leaves. Processed wage progressions and revised manpower report weekly.

SOURCE: 11763983.pdf
JOB TITLE: Human Resources Coordinator
COMPANY: Company Name - City , State
DATES: Mar 2014 - Jul 2014
DESCRIPTION: Processed HR transaction requests from Chrysler facilities into the PeopleSoft HR system. Ensured compliance with SOX guidelines.

SOURCE: 11763983.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Generalist
COMPANY: Company Name - City , State
DATES: Nov 2013 - Feb 2014
DESCRIPTION: Updated employee attendance and issued disciplinary action as necessary. Conducted hearings for discipline related to attendance and code of conduct violations. Conducted workplace investigations.

SOURCE: 11763983.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Representative
COMPANY: Company Name - City , State
DATES: Jul 2012 - Sep 2013
DESCRIPTION: Administered workers compensation claims, unemployment claims, wage progression, employee evaluations, exit interviews. Assisted with attendance system updates and benefits administration.

SOURCE: 11763983.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Manager
COMPANY: Company Name - City , State
DATES: Jan 2002 - Jul 2012
DESCRIPTION: Provided advice on employment matters, investigated complaints. Served as a liaison and consultant for HR issues including unemployment, workers compensation, employee benefits.
